response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio and visual events match the provided JSON reference lyrics for both 'BAD HATTER' and 'ナンセンス'. 
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the JSON reference, while manually transcribing and translating the spoken dialogue during the transition intermission (02:30 to 03:53).
3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly aligned the start and end times to the vocal audio bursts to ensure accurate subtitle synchronization and avoid cascading delays. Included a section for the cute chibi scat singing.

subtitles.original: うわっ！お前、ちゃっかり居るじゃん！
subtitles.english: Whoa! You're here, acting all casual!

subtitles.original: 何持ってるの？
お、ば、バツ？！
えっ、バツってどういうこと、おま...
subtitles.english: Wait, what do you mean by an X? You...

subtitles.original: も、もしかして、おわりちゃんの審査員だったの？！
subtitles.english: Co- Could it be, you were Owari-chan's judge?!

subtitles.original: え、だってさっき...
なんかノリノリでドゥビドゥバドゥビデッデッデッてやってたじゃん！
subtitles.english: You were totally getting into it, doing like 'Dubidubadubidettedette'!

subtitles.original: えっ、出てけって？
なんなんだよ！
おわり頑張った！ちょっと...ちょっと退いてって！
subtitles.english: Owari tried her best! Wait... move over a bit!

subtitles.original: ねえ！
あれ？
なん、なんか...体が...動かないんだけど。
subtitles.english: Wh- Why... can't I... move my body?

subtitles.original: よし、な、なんか離したくてもダメみたいだ。
subtitles.english: Oof... I- It seems I can't let go of it even if I try.

subtitles.original: なんだよ、こっちから！願い下げだ、こんな、こんな地獄！出てってやるー！
subtitles.english: Fine! I didn't want to be here anyway, in this- this hell! I'm leaving!

subtitles.original: はあ、はあ...
ちょっと待ってよ！ちょ、追いつけ、追いつけないよ！
subtitles.english: Wait! I- I can't catch up!

subtitles.original: 何なんだよー！
はあ、見失っちゃった...
はあ... うわぁ... うう... もう...
no thank you, alright?
能天気 どうかしている
不適切 指摘には低姿勢で
正義し放題 mr. x 放火している
subtitles.english: Justice done freely, Mr. X is setting fires

subtitles.original: 真偽不明なんて
正気じゃない
夜は on and on and on
subtitles.english: Night is on and on and on

subtitles.original: 僕ら怨念飲んでへべれけじゃん
subtitles.english: We're drinking up our grudges and getting smashed

subtitles.original: 目には？歯には？ 簡単だ
subtitles.english: For the eyes? For the teeth? It's simple
